name: specify-implementation
when_to_use: When an architecture specification already exists and you need implementation detail.
When the TUI should guide the user through a synchronous implementation flow.

steps.description: Review the requirements, approach, and source architecture first.
Run `powdrr-lift implementation-specification --work-item-name <work-item-name>` to generate the template.
Fill out the feature and decision sections so they stay aligned with the architecture id.
Validate with `powdrr-lift evaluate-implementation-specification --work-item-name <work-item-name>` and fix issues until it passes.
